simple_types.name: Speed
simple_types.code: type Speed is (S125kbps, S250kbps, S500kbps, S1Mbps, S2Mbps, S4Mbps, S8Mbps);

simple_types.name: SPI_Mode
simple_types.code: type SPI_Mode is (Mode_0, Mode_1, Mode_2, Mode_3);

subprograms.name: Controller
subprograms.code: function Controller return not null Any_SPI_Port

subprograms.name: Initialize
subprograms.code:
procedure Initialize (S    : Speed := S1Mbps;
                      Mode : SPI_Mode := Mode_0)

documentation.description:
Initialize the SPI controller at given speed, using the micro:bit SPI
pins:
 - P15 -> MOSI
 - P14 -> MISO
 - P13 -> Clock
Return True if the SPI controller is initialized and ready to use
